name: laravel-vue-navigator
description: Ctrl+Click on an axios endpoint in a Vue/TS file to jump directly to the Laravel controller method (monorepo friendly).

laravelVueNavigator.laravelPath.description: Path (relative to workspace) of the Laravel project root (where 'artisan' lives). Use 'auto' to auto-detect.

laravelVueNavigator.frontendPath.description: Path (relative to workspace) of the Vue/TS frontend project root. Use 'auto' to auto-detect.

laravelVueNavigator.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL prefix to prepend when an axios endpoint does not start with '/'. Example: '/api'.

laravelVueNavigator.phpBinary.description: PHP binary used to run 'artisan route:list --json'.

laravelVueNavigator.useArtisan.description: When true, route resolution prefers 'php artisan route:list --json'. When false, only the static parser is used.

laravelVueNavigator.routeCacheTtl.description: Seconds before the route cache on disk is considered stale (safety net; the file watcher refreshes routes earlier in normal conditions).

laravelVueNavigator.refreshDebounceMs.description: Milliseconds to debounce route refreshes when multiple PHP files are saved in a short window.

commands.title: Laravel-Vue Navigator: Show route for endpoint under cursor
